name: openviking-memory
description: Long-term semantic memory for Codex, powered by OpenViking. Auto-recall on UserPromptSubmit, auto-capture on Stop, and full-session capture before context compaction.

interface.longDescription: Hooks Codex's lifecycle to keep an external semantic memory: recall relevant memories before each user turn, capture user/assistant turns on Stop, and commit the full transcript before PreCompact wipes context. Also exposes explicit MCP tools (openviking_recall, openviking_store, openviking_forget, openviking_health) for manual use.
